nasb.text: You shall give it to Eleazar the priest, and it shall be brought outside the camp and be slaughtered in his presence.

esv.text: And you shall give it to Eleazar the priest, and it shall be taken outside the camp and slaughtered before him.

cnv.text: 你們要把牛交給以利亞撒祭司，他就要把牛牽到營外，在他面前把牛宰了。

ccb.text: 你们要把牛交给以利亚撒祭司，然后牵到营外，当着他的面把牛宰了。
